structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Mode Primary Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In cooling mode, the cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint. Heating coil is OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint between minimum and cooling maximum endpoints. If AHU SAT > room temperature, setpoint shall be no higher than minimum endpoint. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint. b. Heating coil is OFF.

evidence_quote: 5.9.5.1.  When the Zone State  Is Cooling
anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
evidence_text: 5.9.5.1.  When the Zone State  Is Cooling

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating mode, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The heating-loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active primary airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint. Reset discharge temperature from AHU SAT to MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Modulate heating coil to maintain DAT at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. b. The heating-loop shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Series fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, or Vmin; force damper full closed/open; force heating ON/closed; turn fan ON/OFF; and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches interlocked to system level point for the listed overrides.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches can force setpoints, damper, heating, fan, and reset accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to ON/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to ON/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. force heating to ON/closed, f. turn fan ON/OFF, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: commissioning evidence lacks procedure/check action
